title: Createful Plaques
body:
# 🖍️ About 

This **resource pack** replaces the default look of **[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)** Mod with themed **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** plaques!
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dd2b1a4d6e2fd7cec5c36311e0880f858c35d96.png)

# To keep in mind

- This Resource Pack won't do anything on its own, it requires **[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)**.
- Feel free to use this pack in your modpack!
- **Please do not** redistribute this pack.

# Support

If you like this resourcepack you can support me with a coffe on **[Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/cerealconjugo)!** **<3**
